candidate_definition_hints.text: A comprehensive list [AIM@IJCAI'21, P3M@MM'21, GFM@IJCV'22, RIM@CVPR'23, P3MNet@IJCV'23] of our research works related to image matting, including papers, codes, datasets, demos, and citations. Note: The repo for [IJCV'23] "Rethinking Portrait Matting with Privacy Preserving" has been moved to: https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/P3M-Net

source_repo_description: A comprehensive list [AIM@IJCAI'21, P3M@MM'21, GFM@IJCV'22, RIM@CVPR'23, P3MNet@IJCV'23] of our research works related to image matting, including papers, codes, datasets, demos, and citations. Note: The repo for [IJCV'23] "Rethinking Portrait Matting with Privacy Preserving" has been moved to: https://github.com/ViTAE-Transformer/P3M-Net
